entry.title: New: Bill 2982 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2026-03-04
entry.content:
A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING ORDINANCE NO. B-2025-905, AS AMENDED, RELATING TO THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF KAUA‘I, STATE OF HAWAI‘I, FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025 THROUGH JUNE 30, 2026, BY REVISING THE AMOUNTS ESTIMATED IN THE GENERAL FUND (Kawaihau Road Parks Parcel – $800,000.00)

Latest action: On agenda 2026-03-04

View on the council site
